nameMeanings.name: Simonetta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Aurelio, Rocco, Santo, Cosimo, Domenic, Erminio, Francesca, Nicolo.
Italian: from a feminine pet form of the personal name Simone, Italian form of Simon .

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: Simonetta was born in 1140. She had at least 1 son with Umberto della Volta.
